emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The House Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 63/100
========================================

6 issues identified:

MEDIUM
--------------------
- No viewport meta
 HIGH
--------------------
- 12+ HTTP resources
 HIGH
--------------------
- No contact form
 HIGH
--------------------
- Broken booking link
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No H1 tag
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Slow load time


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: No viewport meta
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: 12+ HTTP resources
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without a contact form, visitors must compose their own email - some won't bother.
issues.label: No contact form
issues.check: Scroll the page. Do you see a Name/Email/Message form? If only an email link, there's no form.
issues.siteHint: Contact forms typically boost inbound leads by 30-50%.

issues.detail: The reservation or booking system link leads to a dead page.
issues.label: Broken booking link
issues.check: Click through the booking/reservation process end-to-end.
issues.siteHint: A broken booking link is a direct loss of revenue.

issues.label: No H1 tag
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: The site takes over 4 seconds to fully load on a standard connection.
issues.label: Slow load time
issues.check: Use Google PageSpeed Insights or GTmetrix to check page load time.
issues.siteHint: A 1-second delay reduces hotel bookings by 6%.
